dotfiles reports baseline quality coverage usage

dotfiles reports

Living dashboards for this dotfiles repo, regenerated on every push to main. No screenshots, no stale issues - each page is built from the repo's own git history and test runs.

agent-eval baseline
How well the AI agent obeys the instruction surface, as a pass-rate trend pulled straight from the git history of baseline.json.
how quality is measured
The testing pyramid behind the agent: static evals, integration, real tmux end-to-end sessions, NPS scoring and instruction-loading experiments.
bash test coverage
kcov line coverage for the shell test suite, generated by tests/cover/bash-coverage.sh.
token usage across accounts
Claude Code token consumption per account, anonymized to opaque labels and pulled from each machine's stats-cache. Cache-read tokens are the headline cost.
Built by .github/workflows/pages.yml · Castrozan/.dotfiles
